'''zhanganga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uzarigenin|uzarigenin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ng-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uzarigenin|uzarigenin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhanganga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhængængæth|zhængængæth]] || [[word:zhængængæj|zhængængæj]] || [[word:zhængængæsh|zhængængæsh]] || [[word:zhængængæ|zhængængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhangangangath|zhangangangath]] || [[word:zhangangangaj|zhangangangaj]] || [[word:zhangangangash|zhangangangash]] || [[word:zhanganganga|zhanganganga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhangangath|zhangangath]] || [[word:zhangangaj|zhangangaj]] || [[word:zhangangash|zhangangash]] || [[word:zhanganga|zhanganga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhangafngath|zhangafngath]] || [[word:zhangafngaj|zhangafngaj]] || [[word:zhangafngash|zhangafngash]] || [[word:zhangafngaf|zhangafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhangangatha|zhangangatha]] || [[word:zhangangaja|zhangangaja]] || [[word:zhangangasha|zhangangasha]] || [[word:zhangangaka|zhangangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhangangath|zhangangath]] || [[word:zhangangaj|zhangangaj]] || [[word:zhangangash|zhangangash]] || [[word:zhanganga|zhanganga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhangangathal|zhangangathal]] || [[word:zhangangajal|zhangangajal]] || [[word:zhangangashal|zhangangashal]] || [[word:zhangangakal|zhangangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhangangathatha|zhangangathatha]] || [[word:zhangangajaja|zhangangajaja]] || [[word:zhangangashasha|zhangangashasha]] || [[word:zhangangaka|zhangangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhangangathan|zhangangathan]] || [[word:zhangangajan|zhangangajan]] || [[word:zhangangashan|zhangangashan]] || [[word:zhangangakan|zhangangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhangangathaoro|zhangangathaoro]] || [[word:zhangangajaoro|zhangangajaoro]] || [[word:zhangangashaoro|zhangangashaoro]] || [[word:zhangangakaoro|zhangangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
